hallucination.rationale: The generated note is not a clinical note at all — it is the model's internal reasoning/chain-of-thought that was never resolved into an actual output. No clinical content was produced to evaluate.

instruction_following.rationale: The output is entirely the model's internal deliberation and planning process, not a formatted clinical note. It completely fails to follow the instruction to produce a structured clinical note.

completeness.rationale: No clinical note was produced. All transcript content is missing from any usable output.
missed_items: All transcript content — no note was generated

template_adherence.rationale: No structured output was produced. The entire output is unstructured internal reasoning with no template sections.

entity_marking.rationale: No entity marking was attempted in any final output, as no clinical note was generated.

duplication.rationale: The output contains massive repetition of the same internal reasoning text repeated thousands of times in an apparent infinite loop.
